file_io.note: file I/O delegated to read_ledger/write_ledger helpers

summary: This module provides a single function, load_or_create_ledger, which is responsible for loading an existing Hermes loop execution ledger from disk or creating a fresh one. It handles resumption of interrupted runs by recovering stale pending iterations (timed out after 300s), optionally resets completed goals, and initialises error-tracking and mitigation-state dictionaries in the ledger dict. All actual file I/O is delegated to the read_ledger and write_ledger helpers imported from .file_utils.
